Title: Gossett Brothers Nursery Gift Card
EffCatalogDescription: Gossett Brothers Nursery Gift Card.  The Nursery is located in South Salem, New York.

Title: Historic Hudson Valley Family Membership
EffCatalogDescription:
Your Historic Hudson Valley Family Membership entitles you to a full year of special access and valuable benefits:
Family Membership (2 adults and 2 children)
The Great Jack O'Lantern Blaze, the historic site tours - Philipsburg Manor, Washington Irving's Sunnyside, and Union Church of Pocantico Hills.  Discounted tickets to Kykuit, the Rockefeller Estate, discounts to performance's of Irving's 'Legend' and Dickens's 'Christmas Carol'. A subscription to the Sketchbook, a digital newsletter for HHV supporters including stories about our sites, collecitons, preservation work, and bgehind-the-scenes activities.  A 10% discount at our Museum Shops, including the online shop.

Title: Study with the Maestro and receive a copy of his autobiography
TermsAndConditions: These sessions can be held online or in person at a mutually agreed upon location.
EffTicketTitle: Study with the Maestro and receive a copy of his autobiography
EffCatalogDescription: Spend two hours with the Maestro studying conductiing, music theory, composition, sight singing, coaching players or singers or even a discussion of music!  Receive a copy of his autobiography, "My Choral Journey."

Title: 90 Minutes of your choice Massage!
TermsAndConditions:
Donor must have conversation with holder of donation before massage date to determine medical eligibility and clearance.
Expiration: 5/3/2027
EffCatalogDescription:
90 minutes of your choice massage:
Swedish - long, broad strokes - calming and relaxing
Sports - focus on one particular issue of prep for an upcoming event
Hot Stone - use of hot stones as a tool for releasing tension in the muscle tissue
Deep Tissue - addresses buried "knots" and aids in healing of old injuries and tension
Thai - an artform (fully clothed and on the floor) of massage through compression and traction

Title: Two 60 minute voice lessons with Ellen Taylor Sisson, Soprano
EffTicketTitle: Two 60 minute voice lessons with Ellen Taylor Sisson, Soprano
EffCatalogDescription:
Two 60 minute voice lessons with Ellen Taylor Sisson, Soprano.  Ms. Sisson has soloed with the Academy of St. Martin in the Fields and sung in NY professional choral ensembles, including The New York Virtuoso Singers, Voices of Ascension and Musica Sacra.  She has an active private voice studio serving students in Fairfield and Westchester Counties.  
She is a sought after teacher, specializing in healthy vocal production and technique, applicable to all genres of singing, but especially classical solo and choral singing.

Title: Voice Lesson or Coaching
TermsAndConditions:
The lesson will be held in Katonah, NY, at St. Luke's Episcopal Church.  Details to follow.

Expiration: 5/3/2027
EffCatalogDescription:
One hour of vocal help and instruction on the area of your choice OR one hour of coaching vocal music you choose.

Ellen Lang was a first-place winner of the Concert Artist Guild Award.  She then had a long solo career, after which she sang
in the Metropolitan opera chorus for many years.

As a performer herself in opera, art song, chamber music, pop music, Broadway, etc., she is comfortable coaching students of all levels and goals.

Title: Tour of the Aaron Copland Historic Landmark home!
TermsAndConditions:
Set by mutual agreement, as available in the Copland House calendar.  At least three weeks notice is required for
scheduling.  Tour must be scheduled before May, 2027. This tour is for up to six guests.
EffTicketTitle: Tour of the Aaron Copland Historic Landmark home!
EffCatalogDescription:
An illuminating tour of Aaron Copland's historic landmark home in Northern Westchester County led by Copland House's
Artistic and Executive Director Michael Boriskin, a renowned pianist and prominent authority on Aaron Copland and early
American music history.

Title: Mary Mogil Fitness
TermsAndConditions:
Sessions must be held at Mary Mogil Fitness gym in Goldens Bridge, NY.

Expiration:  May 3, 2027
EffCatalogDescription: Three one-hour personal training sessions with Mary Mogil, Certified Personal Trainer.  The first session includes a health and fitness evaluation, along with a detailed discussion about a previous history with exercise, and then what you would like to achieve going forward.  Overall, the goal is to find an exercise routine that helps you find the best version of yourself!

Title: James Bassi - Piano or Composition Lesson
EffTicketTitle: James Bassi - Piano or Composition Lesson
EffCatalogDescription:
One (1) hour piano or composition lesson, given on-line over Zoom or comparable program, at a mutually agreeable time.
This lesson can also be at his studio in Astoria, Queens.
James Bassi is a pianist, composer, and music director.  He is frequently engaged as rehearsal pianist for the New York Philharmonic, has played many concerts with renowned artists of our time, and has works commissioned by Orchestra of St. Luke's and Voices of Ascension.  He has music directed productions at Lincoln Center Theater and numerous Off-Broadway and regional venues.  He sings tenor with many professional ensembles in NYC.

Title: Private Theory or Composition Lesson with Ramin Amir Arjomand.
EffTicketTitle: Private Theory or Composition Lesson with Ramin Amir Arjomand.
EffCatalogDescription:
Private lesson in classical music theory (including harmony and counterpoint) or composition.
Lesson will be at studio in Brooklyn, NY.

Title: Organ Lesson
EffCatalogDescription: One hour private organ lesson with Jason Roberts.  Lesson will be at Blessed Sacrament Church, 152 W. 71st Street, NYC.
